titleStmt.title: SII 39.230: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 230. (A.R. No. 230 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL VĪRAPRATĀPA DĒ[VARĀYA] MAHARĀYA-ŚAKA 1365 (1443 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to a sarvamaṇya grant by the nāṭṭār and tandarimār of the eighteen districts (Paṟṟu)given to the ryots who inhabited in the nattam lands within the premises of the temples of Tirumuṭṭamuḍaiya nāyaṉār and Ādivarāha nāyaṉār at Tirumuṭṭam in Viḷandai kūṟṟam, a sub-division of Iruṅgōḷapāṇḍi nāḍu in Mēlkālnāḍu, which was a district. of Vaḍagarai Virudarājabhayaṅkara Vaḷanāḍu, for the supply of food offerings at the service called Periyanāṭṭāṉ śandi. The names given as follows Pattiṟai, Kāsupāḍu, Pāḍagavari, Paḻavari, Puduvari, Puḻugubāḍu, Poṟpāḍu, Kāsupāḍu, Lulpāḍu, Mūlaikkūḻipuḍavaipāḍu etc. imposed over the newly settled residents. This document was written by Kachchirāya-Venāvuḍayār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī maṉmahāmaṇṭaliśva
rar hariyarāya vipāṭan pāṣai
kkut tappum Irāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭa
nāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu ko
ṭātāṉ pūṟuva dakṣaṇa paścima Uttara
sapta samudraātipati śrī virapratāpa tevarāya
mahārāyar pradhivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā
niṉṟa cākāṟtam 1000 3 100 6 10 5 mel cellā niṉ
ṟa rudiroṟkāri samvatsarattu viṟuccika nāya
ṟṟu pūṟuva pakṣattu tuvāteciyum comavāramum
peṟṟa repatināḷ vaṭakarai virutarācapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭ
ṭu melkkāl nāṭṭu Iruṅkoḷap pāṇṭināṭṭu vi
ḷantaik kūṟṟattu tirumuṭṭam Uṭaiyār tirumuṭṭa
muṭaiya nāyaṉāṟkum perumāḷ Ātivarāka nāyanāṉāyaṟ
kum yiṉṉāṭu patiṉeṭṭuppaṟṟu nāṭṭār tantarimārrom taṉ
macātaṉa caṟuvamāṉṉiya paṭṭayaṅ kuṭuttapaṭi Iṉṉāyaṉmār tiruma
ṭa viḷākam tiruviruppu nattam nattam nāṉku Ellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa te
rukkaḷil palakuṭiyum palapaṭṭai kuṭiyum Eṟṟuvittu koḷḷakka
ṭava tākavum Eṟṟuvittuk koḷḷum yiṭattu yintakkuṭikaḷ
peṟku māṭu kutirai veḷḷāṭṭikkum nāṭṭuk kāṇikkai
nāṭṭu viṉiyokam paṭṭiṟai pāṭakavari paḻavari putuvari puḻukupā
ṭu poṟpāṭu kācupāṭu puṭavaippāṭu lulppāṭu muḷaik
kūli Eppeṟpaṭṭa pala Upātikkum yiṉṉāyanār perinā
ṭṭāṉ cantiyāka Ucci canti Ammutu ceytaruḷa In
takkuṭikaḷ peṟku Intavarikaḷ cantirātittavaraiyum ca
ṟuva māṉṉiya Iṟaiyiliyāka kaḻittapaṭi Āle cantirātit
tavaraiyum periyanāṭṭāṉ canti Ammutu ceytaruḷi Inta
kkuṭikāṉa peṟku cantiṟātittavaraiyum caṟuvamāṉṉiya Iṟaiyili
Āka Aṉupavittuk koḷḷavum Inta taṉmattukku Ahitam pa
ṇṇivarkaḷum periyanāṭṭāṉ canti Amutu ceytaru paṇ
ṉātavarkaḷum keṅkai karaiyil kapilaiyai koṉṟa pāva
ttile pukakkaṭavārkaḷ Ākavum Immariātikku kalli
lum cempilum veṭṭik kuṭuttom yār tirumuṭṭam Uṭaiya
nāyiṉārkum perumāḷ Ātivarāka nāyaṉārkum patiṉeṭṭuppa
paṟṟu nāṭṭār tantirimārrom Ippaṭikku Ivai periya nā
ṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷ col
la Inta paṭṭayam Eḻutiṉamaikku Ivai kacciyarā
ya veṉāvuṭaiyār Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.230 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
